name: attribute
summary: Full post-meta stack: register the meta key on Ready and provide a typed accessor.
description: Composite that scaffolds both the post meta registrar (with type/default declared via register_post_meta) and a typed provider service for read/write.
problem: You're introducing a new piece of structured data on a post type and you want both the WordPress-level registration and a typed accessor in one shot.
appliesWhen: You're starting fresh on a new post meta key
You want both registration and a typed accessor
Consumers should depend on a service rather than calling get_post_meta directly
avoidWhen: The meta already exists — use phpnomad/meta-provider only
You only need registration, no accessor — use phpnomad/meta only
examples: Add an event_date attribute on the events CPT with a typed accessor
tradeoffs: Two classes plus a Ready listener. Targets post meta only — fork for term/user/comment meta.
outputs: A getListeners() entry registering the registrar on Ready
postApply: Customize sanitize_callback / auth_callback in the registrar if needed
Inject {name}Provider where you previously called get_post_meta()

name.description: Class name shared between the registrar and the provider (PascalCase)

metaKey.description: Meta key stored in the database

postType.description: Post type slug the meta attaches to

metaType.aiHint: One of: string, boolean, integer, number, array, object.

description.example: Event start date in ISO 8601 format
